title: Crunchy Italian Cheese Crumbly
description: A fresh, crumbly kid-friendly dish featuring Thai red curry paste and Mediterranean flavors, perfect for a light meal or snack.
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, grated cheese, olive oil, red curry paste, and salt in a large bowl.
Stir in chopped fresh basil leaves until well combined.
Add panko breadcrumbs to the mixture and mix thoroughly with your hands or a spoon to ensure they're evenly distributed.
Form the mixture into small balls and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake at 400°F (200°C) for about 15 minutes, until golden brown and crispy.
Sprinkle black pepper over the top of each cheese ball to enhance the flavor and add texture.
